smoking_gun_root_cause.implication: Snap's server-side IP-cluster fingerprinting bans the entire account lineage after a few accounts pile up on one carrier IP. This is why Atlas returns 401 even on freshly-created tokens — the IP fingerprint is poisoned upstream.
